title: Lead SEO Specialist at Wrogn Advisory Limited

jsonLd.title: Lead SEO Specialist at Wrogn Advisory Limited
jsonLd.description:
Wrogn Advisory Limited invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of SEO Specialist at our Ranchi location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Wrogn Advisory Limited:
Wrogn Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Wrogn Advisory Limited!
